title: Vršac, Vojvodina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vršac, Vojvodina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vršac is a city in Vojvodina with a population of 36,000. A city in the Banat region of Vojvodina, known for the Vršac Tower, its wine-making tradition, and the nearby Vršac Mountains.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
